name: Generic Entra app-role grant (gallery / SaaS apps incl. SAP, ServiceNow)
status: structure built v2.4.183 -- Graph appRoleAssignedTo, the single mechanism behind 100+ gallery/SaaS apps. Live-validation pending a tenant with a target SP that exposes app roles.
permissionsNeeded: Application.Read.All (to list a target SP's appRoles)

prerequisites.perRowResource: Each desired-state row's Resource column = the OBJECT ID of the target application's service principal (the enterprise app). One connector covers every app that publishes Entra app roles -- SAP Cloud Identity, ServiceNow, Salesforce, etc.
prerequisites.appRolesMustExist: The target SP must expose app roles whose allowedMemberTypes include 'User' (group assignment uses the user-assignment path). Apps with no roles expose only the default-access role id 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000.
prerequisites.groupAssignment: Assigning an Entra GROUP to an app role requires the app to support group assignment (most enterprise apps do; some single-tenant apps restrict to users).
